name: Gigi Gibilisco
shortBio: Returns to the stage with Midnight Productions and currently serves as Assistant Music Director at Notre Dame High School.
fullBio: Gigi Gibilisco is excited to return to the stage with Midnight Productions. He is currently the Assistant Music Director at Notre Dame High School. Past performances include Prince Eric in The Little Mermaid, Aaron Fox in Curtain, Tony in West Side Story, Valjean in Les Misérables, Bat Boy in Bat Boy, Jamie in The Last 5 Years, Jesus in Godspell, and Bill Calhoun in Kiss Me Kate. Gigi holds a Bachelor of Arts in Music, Master of Arts in Teaching in Music Education, and is pursuing a Master of Fine Arts in Composition and Orchestration. He thanks his family and friends for always supporting him.
